creator: Dennis Wise
description: A documentary about Adolf Hitler by Dennis Wise, free of Zionist and Bolshevik Communist lies and hate. Both, Zionism and Bolshevism/Communism are JEW constructs, and Hitler and the German National Socialists fought against both. The documentary, though lengthy, sheds light upon an untold version of history. One that is not accepted by the masses and especially not shown by the mainstream media. It is covered up so that its valuable Truth is not revealed to the Public. But no matter what happens after history.. it will always repeat itself; due to people not being aware of its roots and their own real history.
